pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Evangelion Eva13 (New Paint Ver.) 100% & 400%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are excited to present the Be@rbrick Evangelion Eva13 (New Paint Ver.) 100% and 400% Collectible Set!  These figures stand at approximately 11.02' and 2.75' tall and feature a new paint version of the artificial human, Eva-13 from the hit series Evangelion.  Be sure to add this collectible figure set to your collection today!
